payload.long_description: Rectangular wall-mounted picture frame containing a small sailboat print with double white mat; frame has a thin silver inner trim and a thicker dark outer border, visible glass glare, and is partially cropped/occluded at the lower-right edge by a brown foreground object — appears edge-cropped and approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
